seo_title: Spotify now lets you stream narrated magazine articles, too
meta_description: The streaming service said that, starting today, there will be over 650 long-form magazine articles (available in English only) from publications like Rolling…
body_html: The streaming service said that, starting today, there will be over 650 long-form magazine articles (available in English only) from publications like Rolling Stone, The Atlantic, Vogue, Variety, Billboard, Vibe, GQ, Wired, Vanity Fair, and Pitchfork.

source.title: Spotify now lets you stream narrated magazine articles, too
source.summary: Spotify has expanded its content offerings to include narrated magazine articles, with over 650 titles available starting today. These articles come from prominent publications such as Rolling Stone, The Atlantic, and Vogue, and are currently only in English. The addition is part of Spotify's efforts to provide users with a wider range of engaging audio content.
